brief: Today's news features breakthroughs in biomimetic robotics, escalating Middle East tensions, and AI's role in deepfake abuse, while research papers explore visualization incentives, brain-computer interfaces, and sign language recognition.
news_summary: A robot inspired by diving birds can swim and fly, and a class action lawsuit against AI makers expands over deepfake child sexual abuse material. The US launches airstrikes against Iran, and Maine faces political turmoil as a Senate candidate's withdrawal deadline looms.
papers_summary: Research on performance-based incentives in visualization experiments and a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface trials in China highlight human-computer interaction advances. A multimodal smart glove for sign language recognition using deep learning is also presented.

en.brief: Today's news features breakthroughs in biomimetic robotics, escalating Middle East tensions, and AI's role in deepfake abuse, while research papers explore visualization incentives, brain-computer interfaces, and sign language recognition.
en.news_summary: A robot inspired by diving birds can swim and fly, and a class action lawsuit against AI makers expands over deepfake child sexual abuse material. The US launches airstrikes against Iran, and Maine faces political turmoil as a Senate candidate's withdrawal deadline looms.
en.papers_summary: Research on performance-based incentives in visualization experiments and a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface trials in China highlight human-computer interaction advances. A multimodal smart glove for sign language recognition using deep learning is also presented.

zh.brief: 今日中文新闻聚焦中国异见者董广平偷渡韩国、广西洪灾、澳门国安法首案起诉、德国华人性侵案跨国网络、台湾毒油事件及英国大选热门候选人对华政策等。无重要论文发表。
zh.news_summary: BBC中文报道多起涉及中国社会与政治事件：异见者董广平成功偷渡韩国后赴加拿大；广西洪灾预警失效致民众措手不及；澳门前议员欧锦新被控颠覆罪面临25年刑期；德国华人Telegram群组涉及跨国迷奸案；台湾毒油流入超商暴露监管漏洞；英国首相候选人贝安德的对华政策引发关注。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无中文优先论文，英文论文涉及可视化实验激励、脑机接口临床试验、传统中国画构图分析等。

todays_image.caption: While Robonaut 1A was built for the void of space, today's robot defies gravity and buoyancy alike, proving that machines can now conquer any frontier.
todays_image.title: Robonaut 1A
